round: R74e Task 4 Phase 1 (scope only — DRY-RUN, no writes)
gate: state + sold_date +/-120d + sold_price +/-6%, city/tenant confirm; proximity (<=25mi) approximated by address/city reasoning (SQL cannot geocode comp cities). Final 1:1 vs far-deal disambiguation deferred to the Phase-2 importer geocode step.
method_notes: confirmed_match = a sales_transactions row in state + date+/-120d + price+/-6% with an exact (normalized) city match.
loose_only = price/date/state match but city differs -> needs proximity/identity adjudication.
no_match = no price/date/state candidate at all.
Direct_Co_Broke__c lives in sf_comp_staging.raw_row (sparse: 23/276 rows). Internal comps default to sell-side (is_northmarq=true) when the field is null.

excluded_not_single_asset.note: All 9 are null sold_price. Includes 1 (Referral) [Terre Haute IN], 1 Outside Fee [Lawton OK US Renal], 7 plain null-price pending rows. No priced row carried an exclusion marker.

loose_only_city_alias_dupes_no_import.note: Same deal under an aliased/neighboring city; candidate sale matches to the penny on price + same/near date (e.g. Austintown<->Youngstown '137 vs 139 Javit Ct'; Paris<->Burgettstown PA $2,021,485.08; Lexington<->Red Bank SC '5506 vs 5552 Platt Springs'; West Salem<->Salem OR; Eau Claire<->Lake Hallie WI; Corpus Christi<->Robstown TX). DO NOT IMPORT.
